summary: 45-year-old male electrician Robert Johnson presented with 2-week history of low back pain exacerbated by bending and lifting at work, rating pain 7/10. Physical examination revealed limited lumbar flexion to 30 degrees with pain and positive straight leg raise test on the right at 40 degrees. Patient currently manages symptoms with ibuprofen as needed and has no prior imaging studies.
